'''bazhongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zedoaria|zedoaria]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zedoaria|zedoaria]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bazhongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhengeth|bæzhengeth]] || [[word:bæzhengej|bæzhengej]] || [[word:bæzhengesh|bæzhengesh]] || [[word:bæzhenge|bæzhenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhozhongoth|bazhozhongoth]] || [[word:bazhozhongoj|bazhozhongoj]] || [[word:bazhozhongosh|bazhozhongosh]] || [[word:bazhozhongo|bazhozhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhongoth|bazhongoth]] || [[word:bazhongoj|bazhongoj]] || [[word:bazhongosh|bazhongosh]] || [[word:bazhongo|bazhongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhofngofth|bazhofngofth]] || [[word:bazhofngofj|bazhofngofj]] || [[word:bazhofngofsh|bazhofngofsh]] || [[word:bazhofngof|bazhofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhongotho|bazhongotho]] || [[word:bazhongojo|bazhongojo]] || [[word:bazhongosho|bazhongosho]] || [[word:bazhongoko|bazhongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhongoth|bazhongoth]] || [[word:bazhongoj|bazhongoj]] || [[word:bazhongosh|bazhongosh]] || [[word:bazhongo|bazhongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhongothol|bazhongothol]] || [[word:bazhongojol|bazhongojol]] || [[word:bazhongoshol|bazhongoshol]] || [[word:bazhongokol|bazhongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhongoothotho|bazhongoothotho]] || [[word:bazhongoojojo|bazhongoojojo]] || [[word:bazhongooshosho|bazhongooshosho]] || [[word:bazhongooko|bazhongooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhongothon|bazhongothon]] || [[word:bazhongojon|bazhongojon]] || [[word:bazhongoshon|bazhongoshon]] || [[word:bazhongokon|bazhongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhongothooro|bazhongothooro]] || [[word:bazhongojooro|bazhongojooro]] || [[word:bazhongoshooro|bazhongoshooro]] || [[word:bazhongokooro|bazhongokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
